text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ayaaabeee! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Since I broke your fav mug the other day...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Here! I got you a present! ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
If it's a replacement, then I already bought a new
one. So...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Thanks, but you can keep it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I thought you'd say that! ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, did I pique your interest? Feel free to open
it and see!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: This is...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's a cup sleeve! ♪ With this, your mug will be
safe from accidental drops, and as a plus...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: It's suuuper fluffy and cute!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Sorry... But I can't accept this.

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
I just don't want to get one-sided gifts for no
reason...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. No worries! There's a perfectly good
reason!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Ta-da! ☆

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
It's a different color, but I bought the same one
for myself as well!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Now we can be matching cup sleeve besties!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: You know, I've been wondering...

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text:
Why do you always... try so hard to be nice to
me?

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Honestly, I don't see what you'd get out of it...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Do you really need a reason to want to be
friends?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Do you remember what you said about the
gravitational pull that attracts stars and all things
to each other? You said its true nature is still a
mystery.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I think... there's a mysterious pull between us, too.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: And I want to know you better, Ayabe.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: That's all there is to it.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Just kidding! ♪

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
I just wanted an excuse to get these totes cute
and fluffy cup sleeves! So let's line them up and
snap a pic!

text_block_list.name: Admire Vega
text_block_list.text: I really don't get you... But thanks.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Hehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Shortly after that, the cup sleeves become all the
rage thanks to Curren Chan's post on
Umastagram.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I also buy one out of curiosity... And I must admit,
the fluffiness is strangely addicting.
